# Kaelyn's Academy MCP Server

> A comprehensive K-12 educational platform with AI tutoring support via Model Context Protocol (MCP).

Kaelyn's Academy provides a complete learning management system for K-12 education with:
- Interactive 3D visualizations (Three.js/React Three Fiber)
- AI-powered tutoring with multi-provider support (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini)
- COPPA-compliant child privacy protections
- Multi-tenant white-label support for schools and families

## MCP Server Capabilities

### Tools

#### Authentication (`auth:*`)
- `auth:get-user-info` - Get current authenticated user information
- `auth:check-permissions` - Check if user has permission for an action
- `auth:get-session-context` - Get full session context including organization and role
- `auth:validate-api-key` - Validate an API key and return permissions

#### Curriculum (`curriculum:*`)
- `curriculum:list-subjects` - List all available subjects, filtered by grade level
- `curriculum:list-lessons` - List lessons for a subject, filtered by grade and unit
- `curriculum:get-lesson-content` - Get full lesson content including activities
- `curriculum:search` - Search across curriculum content by keyword

#### Progress Tracking (`progress:*`)
- `progress:get-summary` - Get a learner's overall progress summary
- `progress:get-mastery-levels` - Get mastery levels for subjects/standards
- `progress:get-recent-activity` - Get recent learning activity
- `progress:record-activity` - Record completion of an activity
- `progress:get-learning-path` - Get recommended next steps based on progress

#### Assessment (`assessment:*`)
- `assessment:generate-quiz` - Generate a quiz for a topic and grade level
- `assessment:evaluate-response` - Evaluate a student's response
- `assessment:get-hints` - Get progressive hints for stuck students
- `assessment:explain-concept` - Generate age-appropriate concept explanations
- `assessment:adjust-difficulty` - Recommend difficulty adjustment based on performance

#### Classroom (`classroom:*`)
- `classroom:list-classes` - List all classes for a teacher
- `classroom:get-class-details` - Get detailed class information with enrollment
- `classroom:get-performance-summary` - Get aggregate class performance metrics
- `classroom:enroll-student` - Enroll a student in a class
- `classroom:list-assignments` - List assignments for a class

#### Parent Oversight (`parent:*`)
- `parent:list-children` - List children linked to a parent account
- `parent:get-child-activity` - Get a child's recent learning activity
- `parent:get-controls` - Get parental control settings for a child
- `parent:update-controls` - Update parental control settings
- `parent:get-weekly-report` - Get weekly progress report for a child

#### Admin (`admin:*`)
- `admin:list-organizations` - List all organizations
- `admin:get-organization` - Get detailed organization information
- `admin:get-platform-stats` - Get overall platform statistics
- `admin:search-users` - Search for users across the platform
- `admin:get-system-health` - Check system health and connectivity
- `admin:update-organization-status` - Update an organization's status

### Resources

#### Lessons (`lessons://`)
- `lessons://list` - List all available lesson resources
- `lessons://subject/{slug}` - Get lessons for a specific subject
- `lessons://lesson/{id}` - Get a specific lesson by ID

#### Students (`students://`)
- `students://profile/{id}` - Get a student's profile and preferences
- `students://progress/{id}` - Get a student's learning progress
- `students://achievements/{id}` - Get a student's earned achievements

#### Analytics (`analytics://`)
- `analytics://organization/{id}` - Get analytics for an organization
- `analytics://subject/{id}` - Get analytics for a subject
- `analytics://daily` - Get today's platform-wide activity

### Prompts

#### Tutoring Prompts
- `tutoring:explain-concept` - Generate age-appropriate concept explanations
- `tutoring:help-stuck-student` - Help a student stuck on a problem
- `tutoring:socratic-dialogue` - Engage in Socratic dialogue
- `tutoring:encourage` - Provide encouragement and motivation
- `tutoring:learning-path` - Suggest a personalized learning path

#### Assessment Prompts
- `assessment:generate-quiz` - Generate a quiz for a topic
- `assessment:evaluate-response` - Evaluate a student's response
- `assessment:practice-problems` - Generate practice problems
- `assessment:analyze-misconceptions` - Analyze common misconceptions
- `assessment:adaptive-difficulty` - Recommend difficulty adjustments

## API Endpoints

- `POST /api/mcp` - MCP server endpoint (requires authentication)
- `GET /api/curriculum/subjects` - List subjects
- `GET /api/curriculum/lessons` - List lessons
- `GET /api/progress/:learnerId` - Get learner progress
- `POST /api/assessment/evaluate` - Evaluate responses

## Authentication

The MCP server supports multiple authentication methods:
- Session-based (Auth.js integration)
- API key authentication
- Organization-scoped tokens

## Grade Levels

- K (Kindergarten) = 0
- 1st-12th grade = 1-12

Each grade level has age-appropriate content, UI adaptations, and learning objectives.

## Subjects

- Mathematics
- Reading (US English)
- History
- Science (Physical, Life, Earth, Chemistry, Physics, Biology)
- Technology

## Compliance

- COPPA compliant for children under 13
- WCAG 2.1 AA accessible
- Multi-tenant data isolation
- Comprehensive audit logging

## Links

- Documentation: https://docs.kaelyns.academy
- API Reference: https://api.kaelyns.academy/docs
- MCP Specification: https://modelcontextprotocol.io
